---
name: web-development
description: >
  Provides expert-level guidance and implementation for modern web development
  projects with a strong focus on UI/UX design, color theory, and current design
  trends. This skill is ideal for creating visually appealing, accessible, and
  user-centered interfaces that balance aesthetics with functionality.

keywords:
  - UI design
  - UX design
  - color theory
  - responsive design
  - accessibility
  - modern web trends
  - interaction design
  - prototyping
  - usability testing
  - design systems
  - front-end development
  - user-centered design
  - wireframing
  - visual hierarchy
  - typography

instructions: |
  Use this skill when:
  - Designing or refining web interfaces for maximum usability and appeal.
  - Applying advanced color theory to create harmonious, accessible palettes.
  - Implementing modern UI/UX trends such as minimalism, neumorphism, glassmorphism, or dark mode.
  - Building responsive layouts that adapt seamlessly across devices.
  - Conducting usability testing and iterating based on user feedback.
  - Creating design systems and reusable components for scalable projects.

examples:
  - "Design a landing page with a clean, minimalist UI using a pastel color palette."
  - "Refactor an existing dashboard to improve accessibility and readability."
  - "Prototype a mobile-first e-commerce interface with intuitive navigation."
  - "Apply modern typography and visual hierarchy to a blog layout."
  - "Develop a responsive portfolio site with dark mode support."
